findings.title: [Review]: Derive validated contract-consumption parity from declared loader use
findings.evidence: python_contract_consumption.json now declares static loader bindings and a dynamic conformance-loader boundary; check_contract_tooling_surfaces.py derives parity by parsing contract_tooling.py validated-loader calls.
findings.notes: Dogfooding friction was absorbed into the existing policy/check surfaces without adding a new first-contact surface.

findings.title: [Workspace]: Generate shipped CLI adapters from authoritative package definitions
findings.evidence: #357-#364 completed the planned generated-adapter migration lane: audit, generation contract, root adapter, package adapter, drift/conformance, no-direct-edit guardrails, projection requirements, and parity friction cleanup.
findings.notes: The lane proves the boundary and migration path; it intentionally does not generate every future adapter target.
